title: Privacy on x402 | Rahul Kothari at Agentic Zero
description:
Rahul, product lead at Aztec, explores privacy considerations for x402. Privacy is a spectrum, requiring careful decisions about what information to hide (resources, agents, metadata, facilitators) and from whom. 

All privacy systems involve trade-offs around latency, note discovery, and user experience, requiring developers to thoughtfully choose which aspects of privacy matter most for their specific applications.
